name: Shoo Fly Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolk in a small bowl. Blend in the molasses. Add the boiling water with the baking soda dissolved in it. Set aside.
2. Combine dry ingredients with shortening and work into crumbs using fingers.
3. Pour the liquid into the pastry shell and top with crumbs.
4. Bake in a 400 degree oven for 10 minutes, then reduce heat to 325 degrees and bake for 35 minutes longer.
